plugins.name: agentic-workflow
plugins.description: Spec-durable agentic development workflow: artifact loading, per-turn standing-rule re-injection, distillation gating, and the elicitation/audit/spike/retrospective/entropy skills. Implements agentic-dev-workflow.md.

plugins.name: embedded-target
plugins.description: Extension of agentic-workflow for remote embedded Linux targets (e.g. Jetson): loads DEVICE.md at session start, scaffolds the build-deploy-run-collect harness, repro library, fault-injection and headers-only capture templates, and ships the reproducible / instrument-and-wait debug-loop skills. Implements embedded-target-workflow.md.
